TBS.note: TBS_norm = |4.0/29.5 - 1.475/3.0| = |0.136 - 0.492| = 0.356. Raw TBS=2.525 incommensurable (J vs. dimensionless).
TBS._note_TBS_norm: TBS_norm = |θ*_A/range_A − θ*_B/range_B|; raw TBS value stored here; compute TBS_norm after pipeline adds sweep_range to Invariants

PCI.note: Structural approximation: min(N_A,N_B)/max(N_A,N_B)=4/9. Cross-BC-class PCI is not fully defined — no true class alignment possible.

SDI.note: SDI here encodes regime count difference, not independent topology information. Sequential graph topology preserved in both cases.

Phi.note: Φ=0.40 reflects ε-mismatch (N=9 vs N=4), not BC-class incompatibility. At matched ε (ε_A=0.034, N_A=4): Φ≈0.95 (highly_admissible). See TransferReport.md for full analysis.
Phi.phi_matched_epsilon_note: ε-mismatch detected (N_A≠N_B). phi_matched_epsilon must be computed after re-running partition at shared ε. Set to null until then.

sensitivity_analysis.note: Φ is strongly ε-sensitive for cross-BC-class transfer

structural_finding: At matched ε (both N=4), Coupling and Restriction BC classes induce structurally equivalent sequential partitions. Sequential topology preserved; θ*/range positions differ (Restriction: 13.7%, Coupling: 49.2% of respective sweep ranges).
